summary: Comprehensive testing of Prithvix ERP web portal dashboard completed. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend core features working well with minor UI interaction improvements needed.

design_issues.issue: Clicking farmer rows doesn't open detail drawer
No payment buttons found on credit page for recording payments

passed_tests: All 24 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Navigation to all pages (farmers, inventory, credit, analytics, AI chat, settings)
Farmers table loads with data and search functionality
Inventory page loads with products table
Credit page loads with credit records
Analytics page loads with charts and map
AI Chat interface with language selector
Settings page with profile and subscription info
Staff permissions (staff management hidden from staff users)
action_item_for_main_agent: Implement farmer detail drawer functionality and payment modal on credit page for complete user interaction experience
